author: design-phase-2a-accessibility-md-d5c6
content: Plan: Implement vitreous_a11y crate per phase-2a-accessibility.md design doc. Strategy: (1) Define minimum event types in vitreous_events (Key, KeyEvent, Modifiers, NodeId) needed as dependency, (2) Implement roles.rs with Role enum, AccessibilityInfo/State structs, (3) Implement tree.rs with A11yNode struct and generate_accesskit_tree() for AccessKit 0.24 integration, (4) Implement FocusManager with depth-first tab-order traversal, (5) Implement keyboard.rs mapping role+key to KeyboardAction, (6) Implement warnings.rs with WCAG AA contrast checking and missing label detection, (7) Comprehensive tests for all 12 acceptance criteria. Key decision: a11y crate defines A11yNode as the tree input type — widgets crate will construct these from its Node tree. AccessKit 0.24 uses Node (not NodeBuilder), flag-style setters (set_disabled() with no args), and Toggled enum for checked state.
